hero.title: A website that's truly yours.
hero.subtitle: Edit it yourself. No developer. No monthly fees.
hero.description: I build professional websites with a built-in admin panel — so you don't depend on anyone after launch.
hero.note: Every site is built personally by me. That's why I work with a limited number of businesses at a time.

items.description: You pay a developer every time you want to change a photo or add a new product.
Your site looks great but it's like a locked box — you can't change anything yourself.
You pay monthly "maintenance" fees for things that take 2 minutes.
You need something changed urgently, but you have to wait days until your developer "finds time."

different.title: What makes me different?
different.subtitle: Every site I build comes with an intuitive admin panel — as simple as editing a Word document.
points: Want to change a photo? Log in, upload, done.
New product? Fill in the fields and hit "Save."
different.summary: No code. No calls to a developer. No extra costs.

steps.label: STEP 01
steps.name: We Talk
steps.description: Tell me what you need — what business you have, what you expect from the site, what problem you want to solve. No technical jargon.

steps.label: STEP 02
steps.name: I Build
steps.description: I create the site with professional design and a built-in admin panel, tailored to your exact needs. You see every step and give feedback.

steps.label: STEP 03
steps.name: Deliver & Train
steps.description: You get a finished site + a short training on how to manage it yourself. From that moment on — the site is in your hands.

services.title: Have a business? You need a site.
services.subtitle: It doesn't matter what your business is — what matters is that the site works for you, not the other way around.

items.title: You sell products or services
items.description: Online store, catalog, or service site — with the ability to update everything yourself.

items.title: You want clients to find you online
items.description: A professional presence that inspires trust and turns visitors into customers.

items.title: You want freedom from dependencies
items.description: No monthly maintenance fees. No waiting. Full control from day 1.

portfolio.title: Real projects.
portfolio.subtitle: Projects I've worked on — from online stores to educational platforms.

projects.title: Dar ot Zemyata
projects.description: An online store for natural products from Bulgarian farms. Fresh fruits, vegetables, and farm products delivered directly from the producer to your door.

projects.title: TS Playwright Blog
projects.description: An educational platform for test automation with Playwright and TypeScript. 6 in-depth guides, 100+ code examples — completely free and open source.

about.label: WHO'S BEHIND THIS
about.title: I'm not another agency with some unknown person behind it.
about.bio: For years I've been working in web development and digital marketing — helping both personal and client projects grow online. But besides websites, I love creating things that solve real problems. Here are a few:
about.quote: "Everything I create has one goal — to give control to the people who use it. That's exactly why the websites I build come with such a streamlined admin panel."

items.question: How much does it cost?
items.answer: Every project is unique — that's why I offer a free consultation where we discuss what you need and I give you a concrete offer. No surprises.

items.question: How long does it take?
items.answer: Depends on complexity, but most sites are ready in 2-4 weeks. You see progress throughout and give feedback.

items.question: Do I need to understand tech?
items.answer: No. If you can write an email and upload photos — you can manage your site. Everything is made as simple as possible.

items.question: What if I have a problem after launch?
items.answer: I'm always available. If something doesn't work or you have a question — write to me and I'll help. I don't leave you alone after delivery.

items.question: Are there monthly fees?
items.answer: No. You pay once for the build. The only ongoing costs are hosting and domain, which are minimal.

items.question: Can I see examples?
items.answer: Of course! Check the projects section above or write to me — I'll show you additional examples.

contact.title: Ready for a site you actually control?
